description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with five gracefully curved arms radiating outward, each supporting a lampshade. The arms are adorned with decorative scrollwork, giving the fixture a classic and elegant appearance. The shades are conical and likely made of fabric or frosted glass, diffusing the light softly. The central column is detailed with layered ornamental elements and a chain for ceiling suspension. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm evenly spaced around the central axis. The finish appears to be a light metallic or painted surface, contributing to its refined and traditional aesthetic.
description: A classic five-arm sconce with conical shades, ornate scrollwork, and a central decorative stem, suspended from the ceiling.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all five arms and shades symmetrically arranged around the central stem.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the scrollwork and the staggered arrangement of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all five shades visible and the central stem prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view, again showing the scrollwork and the spatial relationship between the arms.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, classical design with ornate scrollwork and a symmetrical arrangement of arms. Its elegant curves and decorative details evoke a traditional, timeless aesthetic.
